creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is the good one, sorry.

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#       converseen
#       converseen/pkg-descr
#       converseen/Makefile
#       converseen/distinfo
#       converseen/pkg-plist
#
echo c - converseen
mkdir -p converseen > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - converseen/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >converseen/pkg-descr << '29cd59923cd5f78fab07a906cf6661b6'
XConverseen is an open source project written in C++ with the powerful Qt4
Xlibraries. Thanks to the Magick++ image libraries it supports more than 100
Ximage formats. You can convert and resize an unlimited number of images to
Xany of the most popular formats: DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PDF, PhotoCD,
XPNG, Postscript, SVG, and TIFF.
X
XWWW: http://converseen.sourceforge.net
29cd59923cd5f78fab07a906cf6661b6
echo x - converseen/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >converseen/Makefile << 'bb7d823d9f780f8c65706a3ceb981b85'
X# New ports collection makefile for:   converseen
X# Date created:                Nov 9 2012
X# Whom:                        Fernando Apesteguia
<fernando.apesteguia@gmail.com>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X
XPORTNAME=              converseen
XPORTVERSION=           0.5.1
XCATEGORIES=            graphics
XMASTER_SITES=          ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    ${PORTNAME}/Converseen/Converseen%200.5/${PORTVERSION}
X
XMAINTAINER=            fernando.apesteguia@gmail.com
XCOMMENT=               An easy to use graphics conversion utility
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=           Magick++:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/ImageMagick
X
XWRKSRC=                        ${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME}
X
XUSE_CMAKE=             yes
XUSE_BZIP2=             yes
XUSE_QT4=               corelib gui moc_build qmake_build rcc_build uic_build
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
bb7d823d9f780f8c65706a3ceb981b85
echo x - converseen/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >converseen/distinfo << 'ad851af747c7e0ce6cd51e2f2d07386d'
XSHA256 (converseen-0.5.1.tar.bz2) =
df8adf203a5c81c0eab6efed0eaa36636e1346c5859408ae3d9ef93b70908e93
XSIZE (converseen-0.5.1.tar.bz2) = 210538
ad851af747c7e0ce6cd51e2f2d07386d
echo x - converseen/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >converseen/pkg-plist << '2065fdbb4921ef6185b8013178dc8f49'
Xbin/converseen
Xshare/applications/converseen.desktop
Xshare/converseen/converseen_cs_CZ.qm
Xshare/converseen/converseen_de_DE.qm
Xshare/converseen/converseen_es_CL.qm
Xshare/converseen/converseen_fr_FR.qm
Xshare/converseen/converseen_hu_HU.qm
Xshare/converseen/converseen_it_IT.qm
Xshare/converseen/converseen_pl_PL.qm
Xshare/converseen/converseen_pt_BR.qm
Xshare/converseen/converseen_tr_TR.qm
Xshare/kde4/services/ServiceMenus/converseen_import.desktop
Xshare/pixmaps/converseen.png
X@dirrm share/kde4/services/ServiceMenus
X@dirrm share/kde4/services
X@dirrm share/kde4
X@dirrm share/converseen
X@dirrm share/applications
2065fdbb4921ef6185b8013178dc8f49
exit

In case the file is mangled, you can get it from:

https://www.dropbox.com/s/1ywp17h3mahcduc/converseen.shar.txt
